docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOSTER, MICHAEL VINCENT ,AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS, JAMES A. ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ADAMS SECURITY CONSULTANTS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
